Home.title: UnderCut Dashboard
Home.subtitle: Championship standings, upcoming races, and season highlights
Home.standingsBeforeFirst: Standings appear after the first classified race of the season.
Home.standingsComputed: Computed from race results through round {round}. Official standings may differ.
Home.noDriverStandings: No driver standings yet. Data updates after each race is classified.
Home.noConstructorStandings: No constructor standings yet. Data updates after each race is classified.
Home.noRecentResults: No completed races this season. Results will appear here after the first grand prix.
Home.recordsCoverageFull: All-time totals across every race and qualifying result in the database ({min}–{max}).
Home.recordsCoveragePartial: All-time totals across all data in the database. Historical results are currently loaded from {min} onward; earlier seasons are not yet seeded.
Home.recordsCoverageEmpty: All-time totals across the full database. No classified results found yet.
Home.seoIntro: UnderCut is your unofficial Formula 1 data companion — live timing during race weekends, championship standings updated after every grand prix, driver and constructor profiles with career statistics, historical season archives from 1950 onward, and telemetry comparison tools. Explore the {year} season calendar, compare teammates head-to-head, and follow every point in the drivers' and constructors' championships.

Disclaimer.title: Data accuracy notice
Disclaimer.body: UnderCut displays publicly sourced Formula 1 data that may be incomplete, delayed, or contain errors. We do not guarantee accuracy and accept no liability for decisions made using this information.

Telemetry.title: Telemetry Comparison Engine
Telemetry.subtitle: Overlay speed, throttle, and brake traces corner-by-corner.
Telemetry.betaBody: Experimental feature. Telemetry comparison uses sampled session data and may be incomplete or inaccurate. Do not rely on it for timing decisions.
Telemetry.selectPrompt: Select a session, two drivers, and lap numbers to compare.

Seasons.title: Season Archive
Seasons.description: Explore race calendars and results by year. The current season is highlighted below.

Footer.tagline: Unofficial F1 data companion. Not affiliated with Formula 1.

Constructors.listDescription: Teams entered in the {year} season. Switch seasons from the header to compare grids across years.
Constructors.driversTitle: Drivers Who Raced for This Team
Constructors.driversEmpty: No driver data found for this constructor in the database.
Constructors.seasonHistoryEmpty: No season results recorded for this constructor yet.
Constructors.chartEmpty: Not enough season data to chart performance trends.
